texto: Shulman argues that work that is valued is work that is presented to colleagues. The failure to make this kind of wider connection weakens the sense of community. This happens in scholarly life when such essential functions as professional service or teaching do not get discussed openly or often enough.
explicacao: Citação de Charles E. Glassick sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Shulman argues that work that is valued is work that is presented to colleagues.
